scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start:dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:prod -w apps/api" "npm run start:prod -w apps/web"
